features: Professional Makeup Brush Set: A set of 15 makeup brushes in champagne gold looks. Includes foundation brush, kabuki face brush, powder brush, eyeliner brush, eyebrow brush, eye shadow brush, angled brush, concealer brush, blush brush, contouring brush, blending brush and more. Plus a cosmetic bag in the same style

Travel Makeup Brushes & Cosmetic Bag: Whether it's daily travel, party, wedding, date or travel, you can take it with you - Just put them in the makeup brush storage bag. With its stylish champagne gold exterior, it will catch the eye in any occasion such as shopping malls, offices and cafes

Soft Makeup Bristles: Synthetic bristles are dense and soft, odourless and non-irritating to the skin, does not cause discomfort or allergy to the user. Easy to apply, suitable for powder, cream and liquid makeup. Remember to clean the makeup brush bristles after use

Wonderful Gifts for Women: Suitable for women, schoolgirls and working girls, the champagne gold make up brush set is popular with many beauty beginners or experts. Makeup brush sets are a suitable gift for wives, girlfriends or female partners. Birthday, Valentine's Day, Anniversary, Mother's Day, Christmas, Thanksgiving and other holiday gifts

Worry-free After-sales Service: This makeup brush set is from the classic champagne gold makeup brush series of HEYMKGO brand. If You Have Any Questions After Receiving The Product, Please Tell Us First, We Will Provide You With Satisfactory And Fast After-Sales Service:)
